## Summary

Describe the problem clearly.

## Reproduction

1. Share the tool call or command you ran.
2. Share the environment details, including Node version and transport.
3. Share the observed behavior.

## Expected behavior

Describe what you expected instead.

## Logs or output

Include any redacted output that helps reproduce the issue.
